steps.title: Read the graph intercepts
steps.content: The shown line crosses the $x$-axis at $(3{,}0)$ and the $y$-axis at $(0{,}-5)$. The correct equation must produce both intercepts.

steps.title: Test the matching equation
steps.content: For $5x-3y=15$, setting $y=0$ gives $$ 5x=15 $$ so $x=3$. Setting $x=0$ gives $$ -3y=15 $$ so $y=-5$. The answer is A.
